Hardware Component File

DW6_2540_v5.1

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference DW6_2540_v5.1_20180416T093649.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 7E1
Receive ID 7E9
Functional Addr 6E
Functional Name BVA

monitoring completed / NOx aftertreatment monitoring completedMonitor status this driving cycle.Evaporative system monitoring completed / ISO/SAE reserved (Bit shall be reported as '0')Monitor status this driving cycle.Secondary air system monitoring completed / Boost pressure system monitoring completedMonitor status this driving cycle.Oxygen sensor monitoring completed / Exhaust gas sensor monitoring completedMonitor status this driving cycle.Oxygen sensor heater monitoring completed / PM filter monitoring completedMonitor status this driving cycle.EGR and/or VVT system monitoring completedMonitor status this driving cycle.Catalyst monitoring / NMHC catalyst monitoringMonitor status this driving cycle.Heated catalyst monitoring / NOx aftertreatment monitoringMonitor status this driving cycle.Evaporative system monitoring / ISO/SAE reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')Monitor status this driving cycle.Secondary air system monitoring / Boost pressure system monitoringMonitor status this driving cycle.ISO/SAE reserved (bit shall be reported as '0') / A/C system refrigerant monitoringMonitor status this driving cycle.Oxygen sensor monitoring / Exhaust gas sensor monitoringMonitor status this driving cycle.Oxygen sensor heater monitoring / PM filter monitoringMonitor status this driving cycle.EGR and/or VVT system monitoringMonitor status this driving cycle.Misfire monitoring enabledMonitor status this driving cycle.Fuel system monitoring enabledMonitor status this driving cycle.Comprehensive component monitoring enabledMonitor status this driving cycle.Compression ignition monitoring supportedMonitor status this driving cycle.Misfire monitoring completedMonitor status this driving cycle.Fuel system monitoring completedMonitor status this driving cycle.Comprehensive component monitoring completed
